images.name: technitium-classic-authority
images.capabilityProof: The startup bootstrap reads the live API version, denies recursion, removes production QPM limits for the isolated fixture, creates the deterministic plab.test primary zone, and installs the TTL-zero A record before serving classic DNS over UDP and TCP

knownLimitations: This source/config-only wrapper does not redistribute the Technitium image or binaries; Docker acquires the immutable upstream image by digest.
Only deterministic plab.test A over classic DNS UDP and TCP is claimed.
Technitium's default per-client QPM limits are disabled inside this isolated calibration target; production-default rate-limit behavior is outside this package's claim.
The synthetic exact 630-byte truncation fixture and encrypted transports remain explicit unsupported lanes.
